'''tofanaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:labelless|labelless]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-f-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:labelless|labelless]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| tofanaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tofanithi|tofanithi]] || [[word:tofaniji|tofaniji]] || [[word:tofanishi|tofanishi]] || [[word:tofaniki|tofaniki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tofanuthuthu|tofanuthuthu]] || [[word:tofanujuju|tofanujuju]] || [[word:tofanushushu|tofanushushu]] || [[word:tofanukuku|tofanukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tofanuthu|tofanuthu]] || [[word:tofanuju|tofanuju]] || [[word:tofanushu|tofanushu]] || [[word:tofanuku|tofanuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tofanufthuf|tofanufthuf]] || [[word:tofanufjuf|tofanufjuf]] || [[word:tofanufshuf|tofanufshuf]] || [[word:tofanufkuf|tofanufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tofanethe|tofanethe]] || [[word:tofaneje|tofaneje]] || [[word:tofaneshe|tofaneshe]] || [[word:tofaneke|tofaneke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tofanothotho|tofanothotho]] || [[word:tofanojojo|tofanojojo]] || [[word:tofanoshosho|tofanoshosho]] || [[word:tofanokoko|tofanokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tofanotho|tofanotho]] || [[word:tofanojo|tofanojo]] || [[word:tofanosho|tofanosho]] || [[word:tofanoko|tofanoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tofanofthof|tofanofthof]] || [[word:tofanofjof|tofanofjof]] || [[word:tofanofshof|tofanofshof]] || [[word:tofanofkof|tofanofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:tofanïfthïf|tofanïfthïf]] || [[word:tofanïfjïf|tofanïfjïf]] || [[word:tofanïfshïf|tofanïfshïf]] || [[word:tofanïfkïf|tofanïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:tofanïfthïfthïf|tofanïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:tofanïfjïfjïf|tofanïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:tofanïfshïfshïf|tofanïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:tofanïfkïfkïf|tofanïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:tofanïfthïf|tofanïfthïf]] || [[word:tofanïfjïf|tofanïfjïf]] || [[word:tofanïfshïf|tofanïfshïf]] || [[word:tofanïfkïf|tofanïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:tofanïfthïf|tofanïfthïf]] || [[word:tofanïfjïf|tofanïfjïf]] || [[word:tofanïfshïf|tofanïfshïf]] || [[word:tofanïfkïf|tofanïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tofanæthæ|tofanæthæ]] || [[word:tofanæjæ|tofanæjæ]] || [[word:tofanæshæ|tofanæshæ]] || [[word:tofanækæ|tofanækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tofanathatha|tofanathatha]] || [[word:tofanajaja|tofanajaja]] || [[word:tofanashasha|tofanashasha]] || [[word:tofanakaka|tofanakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tofanatha|tofanatha]] || [[word:tofanaja|tofanaja]] || [[word:tofanasha|tofanasha]] || [[word:tofanaka|tofanaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tofanafthaf|tofanafthaf]] || [[word:tofanafjaf|tofanafjaf]] || [[word:tofanafshaf|tofanafshaf]] || [[word:tofanafkaf|tofanafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:tofanasha|tofanasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:tofanshësha|tofanshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tofanrosha|tofanrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tofanmusha|tofanmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:tofanyasha|tofanyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotofankshësha|gotofankshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotofankrosha|gotofankrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotofankmusha|gotofankmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotofankyasha|gotofankyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:tofafanasha|tofafanasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tofafanshësha|tofafanshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tofafanrosha|tofafanrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tofafanmusha|tofafanmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tofafanyasha|tofafanyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotofafankshësha|gotofafankshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotofafankrosha|gotofafankrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotofafankmusha|gotofafankmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotofafankyasha|gotofafankyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:tefænasha|tefænasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tefænshësha|tefænshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tefænrosha|tefænrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tefænmusha|tefænmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tefænyasha|tefænyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotefænkshësha|gotefænkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotefænkrosha|gotefænkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotefænkmusha|gotefænkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotefænkyasha|gotefænkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:tofanasha|tofanasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tofanshësha|tofanshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tofanrosha|tofanrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tofanmusha|tofanmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tofanyasha|tofanyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotofankshësha|gotofankshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotofankrosha|gotofankrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotofankmusha|gotofankmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotofankyasha|gotofankyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
